title: Credit History Record Schema
description: Unified schema for credit history data from external data providers

company_id.description: External company identifier from data provider (will be mapped to Shopify B2B company ID)

inflow.description: Money received (credit) in base currency units

outflow.description: Money spent (debit) in base currency units

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g., USD, NGN, GBP)

shopify_company_id.description: Mapped Shopify B2B company GID (enriched after extraction)

provider_id.description: Unique identifier of the data provider
